creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! (Please note that, according to the port's CVS log, your 
maintainer status was reset in September 2006 due to 
inactivity/unresponsiveness. The port is currently without an official 
maintainer. You're welcome to reclaim the port, of course, since you still seem 
to have an interest in it.)
